sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34925" key="e)napologe/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναπο-λογέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n34925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">defend oneself in</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῇ πόλει</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.122</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
